data.title: RedStone Launches Community-Powered Miners Program for Web3 Builders
data.description:
TL;DR RedStone launched its ‘Miners’ program, a quarterly initiative that organizes and rewards the most active community members. The system includes three levels of participation with scalable benefits, ranging from community access to monthly compensation. Users must join thematic cohorts such as development, social media, or visual content. They will have clear objectives and their
source: https://crypto-economy.com/redstone-launches-community-powered-miners-program-for-web3-builders/

data.title: Altcoin market suffers dramatic contraction amid economic uncertainty
data.description:
10-4-2025 – The alternative cryptocurrency sector has experienced a precipitous decline in recent months, shedding more than 40% of its market capitalisation since reaching its zenith last December. What was once a trillion-dollar market has contracted dramatically to $583 billion, reflecting broader concerns about liquidity and investor sentiment. This market contraction coincides with mounting apprehension [.
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/altcoin-market-suffers-dramatic-contraction-amid-economic-uncertainty/

data.title: Here’s how Robert Kiyosaki’s top investments are playing out in 2025
data.description:
Robert Kiyosaki, author of the best-selling personal finance book ‘Rich Dad Poor Dad’, has long based his investment philosophy on real assets, consistently dismissing fiat currencies as ‘fake money.’ In 2025, his favored assets have delivered mixed results. Gold and silver have maintained their upward momentum, reaching new all-time highs, while Bitcoin (BTC) has faced heightened volatility, trading mostly sideways or trending downward. Despite recent market volatility, Kiyosaki remains committed to the trio, with the author planning to continue building his own ‘standard’ around the assets to weather what he calls the ‘DOGE CHAINSAW MASSACRE’—his term for the Trump administration’s economic policy
source: https://finbold.com/heres-how-robert-kiyosakis-top-investments-are-playing-out-in-2025/

data.title: Meanwhile raises $40M to bring BTC life insurance to inflation-prone economies
data.description:
Crypto startup Meanwhile has raised $40 million to scale its Bitcoin-denominated life insurance business, targeting so-called “inflation-prone economies” where policyholders may seek alternatives to traditional fiat-based payouts. The Series A investment round was led by Framework Ventures and Fulgur Ventures, with additional participation from Xapo founder Wences Casares, the company disclosed on April 10.  Meanwhile previously secured $20. 5 million in seed funding backed by OpenAI CEO Sam Altman and others
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/meanwhile-raises-40-million-bitcoin-life-insurance?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Nasdaq Files to List VanEck Avalanche ETF, Bringing AVAX Closer to Mainstream
data.description:
TL;DR Nasdaq has officially submitted an application to the SEC to list VanEck’s proposed Avalanche ETF, offering regulated exposure to the AVAX token without direct purchase. VanEck continues to expand its crypto ETF portfolio, adding Avalanche to its prior filings for Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Solana. The move to include Avalanche in these investment products shows. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/nasdaq-files-to-list-vaneck-avalanche-etf-bringing-avax-closer-to-mainstream/

data.title: Coinbase International will launch COMP, UXLINK, and ATH perpetual contract trading
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to the official announcement, Coinbase International Station will launch COMP, UXLINK, and ATH perpetual contract transactions.

data.title: A 2-year ETH holder deposited 2,300 ETH to Kraken, equivalent to approximately $3.58 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to The Data Nerd, a 2-year ETH holder deposited 2,300 ETH (about $3.58 million) to Kraken half an hour ago. Two years ago, the address accumulated these ETH at an average price of $1,298. If sold at the current price, the address will make a profit of about $600,000.
